title: My Troubled Pony
description: Roxanne is a troubled pony, navigating romance and danger with her best friend Daffodil and lovers, Javier and Guillermo.
quote: Javier, I’m afraid I don’t Have much time left. Tomorrow they”re sending me to the glue factory.
parent: The Grim Adventures of Billy & Mandy
altHero: Roxanne, a sad purple pony with big hair and a bow
alt1: Roxanne talking to Javier, a pony with mustache and sombrero
alt3: Guillermo, a pony with an eyepatch, holds Roxannes hoof as they dange from a helicopter
